name: Data entity has a data owner
Data entity belongs to a data domain or data entity
Data entity has a data attribute
Data domain has a domain lead
Data attribute belongs to a data entity

definition: A data entity should belong to at least one data domain
name: Data entity belongs to a data domain or data entity
Data domain has a data entity

definition: This data domain is about the production data of the plant facilities.
name: plant data

definition: This attribute describes the solid-line reporting, direct reporting relationship between a supervisor and a subordinate employee. The hierarchical lead covers mainly daily operations.
name: Hierarchical Organization

definition: This attribute contains the full name of an employee. This is the name by which people can be identified and on which they are reported on.
name: Fullname

definition: This attribute describes the solid-line reporting, direct reporting relationship between a supervisor and a subordinate employee. The hierarchical lead covers mainly daily operations.
name: Hierarchical Organization

definition: This attribute is used to allocate costs and for management purposes, and is automatically filled based on the chosen Organization and follows the logic of the predefined operating model (decision tree).
name: Basket

definition: This attribute describes the additional terms of employment that will apply to an employee that is involved in a placement. In this context, a placement means that an employee is assigned to a project or branch office.
name: Placement

definition: This attribute contains the full name of an employee. This is the name by which people can be identified and on which they are reported on.
name: Fullname

definition: Email address where the contact person can be reached
name: Contact person mail address

definition: Generic email address where company can be reached
name: Generic mail adress

definition: Generic phone number where company can be reached
name: Generic phone number

definition: Production Planning involves scheduling and organizing the steps necessary for manufacturing goods. It ensures that resources like materials, equipment, and labor are optimally allocated to meet production goals. The data in this domain focuses on upcoming production orders, resource availability, and the timeline for completing production activities. Key elements include scheduling, order prioritization, and capacity management.
name: Production Planning

definition: A numeric value representing the total number of products produced during a specified timeframe or production run.
name: Product Counter

definition: Operational Monitoring focuses on real-time tracking of the status and performance of machinery and systems in a production environment. This domain ensures that equipment operates efficiently, safely, and within desired parameters. Data includes machine states (e.g., running, idle, maintenance), sensor readings (e.g., temperature, pressure), and any performance metrics that indicate machine health and overall operational efficiency.
name: Operational Monitoring

definition: Order Management refers to the process of tracking and managing customer orders from initiation to fulfillment. It ensures that production aligns with customer demands and that orders are fulfilled on time. The data in this domain typically involves tracking current and upcoming orders, their statuses, order priorities, and the logistical flow from receipt to delivery.
name: Order Management

definition: Focuses on the metrics related to overall production efficiency and performance.
name: Production Performance

definition: The identifier for the order currently being processed or fulfilled.
name: Current Order

definition: This entity name captures both the production order management aspect and the fulfillment metrics .
name: Order Processing and Fulfillment

definition: Represents the core attributes of each customer order including shipment and deadlines.
name: Customer Order

definition: The average percentage of ordered quantities that have been successfully fulfilled across multiple orders over a specific period.
name: Order Fulfillment

definition: The total number of orders that have been successfully completed and shipped on the current day.
name: Fulfilled Orders Today

definition: The number of orders scheduled for production or fulfillment within the current day.
name: Planned Orders Today

definition: The rate at which products are produced, typically measured in units per hour or units per minute.
name: Throughput

definition: The projected time remaining until a specific order is fully fulfilled, often provided to manage customer expectations.
name: Estimate Time of Completion

definition: The ongoing status of order processing, which  indicates the percentage of an order that has been fulfilled to date.
name: Current Fulfillment

definition: The total number of units delivered to customers from a specific order.
name: Fulfilled Quantity

definition: The total number of units requested by the customer in a specific order.
name: Ordered Quantity

definition: The operating temperature of the machine's motor which is used to ensure the motor is functioning within safe temperature ranges.
name: Motor Temperature

definition: The pressure of air within the machine's system used to monitor the efficiency and functionality of pneumatic systems.
name: Air Pressure

definition: The total energy consumption of the machine during operation indicating the efficiency and performance of the machine.
name: Total Power

definition: State of country where the entity is legally registered
name: State of registration

definition: A numeric value indicating the number of defective or unusable products generated during the production process.
name: Scrap Counter

definition: Official website link owned and operated by the supplier
name: Company website

definition: The current operational status of the machine, which may include states such as "Executing" or "Non-Executing"."
name: State

definition: Operating city where the entity is legally registered
name: Operating City

definition: The identifier for the next order to be processed, sequentially generated for tracking and organization.
name: Next Order Number

definition: The total quantity of products  available in stock at a given time.
name: Inventory Level

definition: The percentage of products produced that meet quality standards relative to the total number of products produced, calculated as (Total Products Produced - Scrap) / Total Products Produced * 100.
name: Yield

definition: Generic (master) data that represents the supplier that wants to do business with the company
name: Company Information

definition: A unique identifier assigned to each customer order for tracking and management purposes.
name: Order Id

definition: It refers to the specific date and time by which a product must be delivered to the customer, as agreed upon in the order or contract.
name: Customer Deadline

definition: This attribute describes the country and related type of working conditions that are applicabl
name: People Group

definition: The scheduled time or date allocated for shipping the order, often used to manage logistics and delivery.
name: Shipment Slot

definition: This data domain contains data from the finance department
name: Finance

definition: Monitors stock levels and production capacity.
name: Inventory and Capacity Planning

definition: Tracks the operational status and health of machines, focusing on environmental and power-related metrics.
name: Machine Health Metrics

definition: This attribute yields the date (yyyy-ww) of the "event"-date
name: date

name: AssetId

definition: This attribute yields the Id of the relevant work center
name: WorkCenterId

definition: This attribute yields the (unscheduled) down time of the machine(s) in seconds
name: DownTime

definition: This attribute yields the month of the "event"-date
name: month

definition: This attribute yields the current status of the equipment
name: EquipmentStatus

definition: This entity contains information about the organizational unit in which a group of employees work together within an assigned discipline.
name: Organization

definition: This attribute describes the solid-line reporting, direct reporting relationship between a supervisor and a subordinate employee. The hierarchical lead covers mainly daily operations.
name: Hierarchical Organization

definition: This attribute yields the month of the "CreatedOn"-date
name: month

definition: This attribute yields a code that corresponds to the SKUId
name: SKU

definition: This attribute yields the Id of the site of the relevant plant facility
name: SiteId

definition: This attribute yields the name of the relevant work order
name: WorkOrder

definition: This attribute yields the idle time of the machine(s) in seconds
name: IdleTime

definition: This attribute yields the category of the relevant asset which corresponds to its name
name: AssetCategory

definition: This attribute yields the duruation of the downtime
name: DownTimeDuration

definition: Data that represents how the supplier can be contacted
name: Company Contacts

definition: This attribute describes the name of the function in which the tasks in the functional area are executed. Including the level, which is a reference to the Job Grade.
name: Job Name

definition: This attribute contains a unique identifier for the employee.
name: Employee Number

definition: Mobile or work phone number where the contact person can be reached
name: Contact person phone number

definition: Role of contact person within the declared legal entity
name: Contact person function

definition: This attribute yields the abbreviation/name of the relevant plant facility which corresponds to the Id
name: Plant

definition: This attribute yields the abbreviation/name of the site of the relevant plant facility
name: Site

name: SKU

name: Type of ownership

definition: This attribute describes the name of the function in which the tasks in the functional area are executed. Including the level, which is a reference to the Job Grade.
name: Job Name

name: Operating State

name: Legal entity
